sll $0,$0,0
#initialize
addi $0,$0,0x0000

# sc test: store conditional word
lui $1,0x1001
ori $1,$1,0x0000
sw $0,0($1)
addi $2,$0,0x5678
ll $3,0($1)
addi $3,$3,0x0001
sc $3,0($1)
lw $4,0($1)

# Test sc with different values
addi $5,$0,0x1234
sw $5,4($1)
ll $6,4($1)
addi $6,$6,0x0001
sc $6,4($1)
lw $7,4($1)

# Test sc with negative value
lui $8,0xFFFF
ori $8,$8,0x8000
sw $8,8($1)
ll $9,8($1)
addi $9,$9,0x0001
sc $9,8($1)
lw $10,8($1)

# Test sc with zero
addi $11,$0,0x0000
sw $11,12($1)
ll $12,12($1)
addi $12,$12,0x0001
sc $12,12($1)
lw $13,12($1)

# Test sc with max positive
lui $14,0x7FFF
ori $14,$14,0xFFFF
sw $14,16($1)
ll $15,16($1)
ori $15,$15,0x0001
sc $15,16($1)
lw $16,16($1)

halt
